title: 3 Analyst Favorite ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Likely This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment, which now is trending higher, many investors have turned to equities, not only for the growth potential but also for the solid and dependable dividends that help to provide an income stream.

title: Factors to Note Ahead of NetApp's (NTAP) Q4 Earnings Release
text: NetApp's (NTAP) fiscal fourth-quarter performance is likely to reflect strength in the Public Cloud Services and all-flash storage business

title: NetApp (NTAP) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: NetApp (NTAP) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: NetApp (NTAP) Acquired Instaclustr to Boost Cloud Operations
text: NetApp's Instaclustr is part of a series of strategic acquisitions, including CloudCheckr, Data Mechanics, Fylamynt and Spot, to provide comprehensive solutions for Cloud Operations capabilities.

title: NetApp Closes Acquisition of Instaclustr
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp acquires Instaclustr, a platform provider of fully managed open-source database, pipeline & workflow applications delivered as a service.

title: NetApp (NTAP), Kyndryl Team up to Boost Data Management
text: NetApp (NTAP) partners with Kyndryl to develop solutions to aid companies in gaining more insights from unstructured datasets.

title: Kyndryl and NetApp Announce Alliance to Fast-track Cloud Transition and Transformation for Customers
text: Partners to Focus on Extracting Insights and Enabling Innovation from Unstructured Data NEW YORK and SAN JOSE, Calif. , May 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kyndryl (NYSE: KD), the world's largest IT infrastructure services provider, and NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), a global cloud-led, data-centric software company, today announced a global alliance to help customers transform their businesses by unlocking insights from data stored on premises, in the cloud and edge computing environments.

title: Spot by NetApp Delivers Cloud Desktop-as-a-Service Solution for Service Providers, Enterprises and Today's Distributed Workforce
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp announced the general availability of Spot PC, the managed cloud Desktop-as-a-Service (DaaS) solution for the public cloud.

title: Spot by NetApp Survey Shows Organizations Continue to Prioritize Cloud Optimization, but are Still Experiencing Challenges
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp announced the results of the annual Cloud Infrastructure Report based on a survey of public cloud business and IT decision makers.

title: NetApp Teams with NVIDIA to Accelerate HPC and AI with Turnkey Supercomputing Infrastructure
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NetApp EF600 all-flash NVMe storage combined with the BeeGFS parallel file system is now certified for NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD™.
